dbExport.title: Save your receipts
dbExport.desc: Backup your current data to a file so you don't lose the lore

dbImportDesc: Lowkey warning! This is gonna override everything, no cap

dbImportOld.title: Import data from a prehistoric version of Ampersand
dbImportOld.desc: For backup files from when Ampersand was in its flop era (< 0.2.0)
dbImportOld.note: Old Ampersand used a file format (ampdb) that's basically ancient history now. If you're still holding onto those old backups, import them ASAP and re-export, because this option is getting deleted soon. Don't say we didn't warn you.

ocImport: Import your Octocon data (main character energy)
tuImport: Import your Tupperbox data (real ones know)
spImport: Import your Simply Plural data (we love to see it)

status.imported: The backup is officially here. Restart the app to see the vision.
status.importedSp: Simply Plural data imported. Restart the app, bestie.
status.importedOc: Octocon data imported. Restart the app for the vibes.
status.importedPk: PluralKit data imported. Restart the app to lock it in.
status.importedTu: Tupperbox data imported. Restart the app and stay winning.
status.exportedApp: The backup has been yeeted to your chosen spot.
status.exportedAppIos: The backup is chilling in the Ampersand folder in your Files app.
status.errorExport: Exporting the backup failed. Major L.
status.error: Importing the backup failed. We're crying.
status.errorOc: Octocon import failed. That's not it.
status.errorSp: Simply Plural import failed. Absolute chaos.
status.errorPk: PluralKit import failed. The math isn't mathing.
status.errorTu: Tupperbox import failed. It's a flop.
